mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id ORDER BY e.id LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, gender, birth_date, phone, email, department_id, position, salary, hire_date, status, avatar) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{departmentId}, #{position}, #{salary}, #{hireDate}, #{status}, #{avatar})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE status = 1
